CustomField.description: Set when an admin (or the auto-aging job) marks a Failed sync item as triaged. Dismissed items remain queryable for audit but are excluded from the Sync Health % widget and the default failed-sync retry panel view. Null = active. Cleared by the restore action.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The DateTime this Failed sync item was dismissed (manually or by auto-aging). Dismissed items still exist but are hidden from health metrics.
CustomField.label: Dismissed
